items.name_en: In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25s hobo, I really love it, one bag three uses
Medium size with a very lazy vibe! Pull the strap tight to instantly turn it into a backpack 🎒. Loosen the strap to turn it into a single-shoulder hobo. The flexible strap design is amazing. The front of the bag features a simple and elegant large quilted pattern. Dual metal chains on both sides with double-C adjustable buckles. Calfskin is soft, delicate, practical, and easy to maintain! The strap is adjustable for DIY carrying styles: underarm hobo, backpack, shoulder bag, handbag, etc....
Size: 20*31*8.5cm 99471

items.name_en: In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
To be honest, this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Dimensions 21 10 20.5cm
Number A2210 Large
Lambskin Caramel Brown

items.name_en: In Stock Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition Lambskin Black
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition Lambskin Black
Chanel jumbo Victoria Beckham backpack. The backpack version of the Victoria Beckham bag is very special, with large double-C logos that are cool and eye-catching, very stylish💃 It's hard to run into someone with the same bag. It has a strong vintage feel, with an internal zipper and strong practicality. A bag suitable for both personal use and collection.
Size 28.8.20cm
Number A2219 Backpack
